test.observation: 101 tests passed across 13 test files (includes 3 new tests for fix-profile-save-error). Duration: 1.26s.

failedFeatureReasons.foundation-profile-frontend: Original feature had blocking bug (saveProfile error handler set status to 'loaded' instead of 'error'). BLOCKING ISSUE IS NOW FIXED by fix-profile-save-error. Remaining issues are non-blocking: cancelEditing doesn't restore values, edit mode wiring incomplete, unused sanitizeProfile, Google Fonts external dependency.

issues: cancelEditing() doesn't restore previous profile values
ProfilePage doesn't wire ProfileForm for edit mode
handleNameChange clears ALL errors instead of just name error
Google Fonts loaded from external URL violates offline-first constraint
Skip button has no skip/onSkip callback prop
sanitizeProfile function is unused
eslint.config.mjs ignores **/*.config.ts files, vitest.config.ts is NOT linted
eslint.config.mjs disables @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars entirely ('off')
lint script uses deprecated '--ext ts,tsx' flags in ESLint flat config mode
vite.config.ts has dead test configuration block duplicated in vitest.config.ts
DB_PATH is relative ('./data/openmarcus.db') — could break if process cwd differs
Development fallback encryption key hardcoded in source
Session state machine names diverge from architecture doc
action_items stored denormalized in both sessions and separate table
Profile name/bio stored in BOTH plaintext columns AND encrypted_data blob
MigrationRunner doesn't handle schema evolution — no rollback, no transaction wrapping
ValidationError class duplicated in routes/profile.ts
Route handlers bypass ProfileService entirely
Development encryption key hardcoded in source
Route tests reimplement route handlers inline
Route tests use inline createTestApp that DUPLICATES route handler logic
POST /api/sessions handler has dead-code branch
N+1 query problem on GET /api/sessions
Uses require() for dynamic imports in ESM project
Missing route-level tests for DELETE /:id and PATCH /:id/status
Route tests use inline handlers instead of importing actual routes
getContextForAI fallback to random quotes when no query provided is undocumented
Tag search uses LIKE-based JSON matching — false positives possible
Duplicate auto-dismiss timers in Toast component AND toast store
Missing exit animation code in Toast component
ErrorBoundary refresh button has redundant setState
Placeholder pages defined inline in App.tsx instead of separate files
Data loss risk on import failure: clearAll and import are separate transactions
Import success test removed after jsdom debugging difficulties
Minimal import validation — only checks top-level fields

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify React version: AGENTS.md states React 19 but package.json uses React 18. Update to match actual dependency. Also clarify that Google Fonts via CDN are acceptable despite 'fully offline' constraint, or mandate local font files.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-project-setup review: AGENTS.md says 'React 19' but package.json has react: ^18.3.1. foundation-profile-frontend review: Google Fonts loaded from https://fonts.googleapis.com violates 'External network calls (fully offline)' rule.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document backend directory structure: actual code is in 'backend/' at project root, not 'src/backend/' as AGENTS.md shows. Also document backend/lib/ convention for static content files.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-database-schema review: backend/ exists at root level. foundation-stoic-content review: worker discovered backend/lib/ convention through exploration.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit convention: route test files MUST import and test actual route modules (e.g., import router from '../routes/session.js'; app.use('/api/sessions', router)), NEVER duplicate route handler logic inline in test files.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All route test files (profile.test.ts, session.test.ts, content.test.ts) use inline createTestApp() that duplicates production route logic. This means route-level behavior is NOT actually being tested.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document ESM import requirement: services must use 'import' or 'await import()', NOT 'require()' for dynamic imports, since project uses '"type": "module"'.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-stoic-content review: ContentService failed when using require() from server startup. foundation-session-api review: session.ts and profile.ts both use require() which is fragile with tsx.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document session state machine naming convention. The schema uses: intro, active, closing, summary. The architecture doc uses: CREATED, ACTIVE, CLOSING, COMPLETED, PAUSED. Reconcile and document canonical names.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-database-schema review: schema uses different names than architecture.md. PAUSED state entirely missing from schema.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: backend-worker skill should explicitly instruct workers to test ROUTE HANDLERS by importing actual route modules, not by redefining handlers inline in test files.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-session-api and foundation-stoic-content reviews both identified this anti-pattern.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: frontend-worker skill should include explicit guidance about TanStack Query setup: QueryClient must be instantiated at module scope, NOT inside component function body.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-project-setup review: worker created queryClient inside App() component, defeating TanStack Query caching.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: frontend-worker skill should document jsdom limitations: jsdom doesn't support dialog.showModal(), file input triggers, and navigation via anchor elements. Workers waste debugging time on these known limitations. Skill should provide workarounds.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-data-export review: worker spent significant iterations debugging jsdom dialog and file input issues. foundation-profile-frontend review: no e2e tests created due to jsdom limitations.

rejectedObservations.observation: Update services.yaml to document how dev:backend works with .ts files (requires tsx)
rejectedObservations.reason: This is factual knowledge, better suited for library docs or AGENTS.md than operational services.yaml config. The command in services.yaml already works correctly.

rejectedObservations.observation: MigrationRunner should use transactions for multi-statement migrations
rejectedObservations.reason: This is an implementation improvement suggestion for the database layer, not a shared state observation that belongs in AGENTS.md, library, or skills.

rejectedObservations.observation: scrypt N=2^14 is on the lower end for memory-hard functions
rejectedObservations.reason: Already documented as acceptable in foundation-database-schema review. For a local-first app with no network attack surface, this is fine.
